## Checklist

- [ ] Internal links verified (no broken references)
- [ ] `INDEX.md` updated (if adding/renaming a standard)
- [ ] Navigation footer chain updated (Previous/Next links)
- [ ] No project-specific references (generic naming only)
- [ ] `markdownlint` passes (`pre-commit run markdownlint-cli2 --all-files`)
